calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-09-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Petitioner Arden-Jaye rodgers present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The petitoner did not have complete medical certificate and no publication as to the GENDER Change, request to have the Hearing on the NAME CHANGE only.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition for CHANGE OF NAME are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for change of name ONLY to: Angela Jones.
Decree signed in open court.
